LanguageData.NCL_MechSelfRepair_PsycastsMilitor.label: Area Repair
LanguageData.NCL_MechSelfRepair_PsycastsMilitor.descr: The psychic Militor uses telekinesis to partially heal scars on all allies within a 25-cell radius.
LanguageData.NCL_SkipShieldGeneration_PsycastsMilitor: The psychic Militor telekinetically steals three shield packs from the nearest trade ship's cargo hold and instantly equips them on the three allies closest to enemy forces.
LanguageData.NCL_TeleportSkip.label: Psychic Skip
LanguageData.NCL_TeleportSkip.description: The psychic Militor instantly teleports a target to a designated location using telekinesis.
LanguageData.TW_MechSelfRepair_PsycastsMilitor.label: Area Repair
LanguageData.TW_MechSelfRepair_PsycastsMilitor.descri: The psychic Militor uses telekinesis to partially heal scars on all allies within a 25-cell radius.
The psychic Militor telekinetically retrieves three shield packs from the nearest merchant vessel's cargo racks and instantly deploys them onto three frontline allies positioned nearest to hostile forces.
LanguageData.TW_TeleportToRandomAlly.label: Adversary Relocation
LanguageData.TW_TeleportToRandomAlly.description: Teleports an enemy combatant adjacent to a nearby allied unit.
